subject: [PATCH v7 4/4] mm: swap: filter swap allocation by memcg tier mask

reviews.author: Nhat Pham
reviews.summary: Approved the patch as a first step, but raised concerns about the performance implications of adding per-cpu caching for each device. Proposed using a data structure to store swap information and suggested that the extra overhead is minimal.

2026-05-30.patch_summary: Patch v7 of mm: swap: filter swap allocation by memcg tier mask received a positive review from Nhat Pham, who suggested adding per-cpu caching for each device and proposed a data structure to store swap information.
